name: qa-claude
description: Marketplace dùng chung cho các project automation QA của Finan — commands/skills/rules/agents đóng gói theo plugin, sửa 1 nơi update mọi project.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Skill/command dùng chung mọi project (git, build-verify, missing-test-ids, status, ask) — domain-agnostic.

plugins.name: appium
plugins.description: Bộ automation mobile Appium (Android/iOS/Flutter): cook/plan/fix/exploratory/run + skills POM + rules + agents discovery.
